scripts.archive: npm run build && ch5-cli archive -p MCCCD-AA140 -d dist -o output -c contracts/output/MCCCD_AA140/interface/mapping/MCCCD_AA140.cse2j
scripts.deploy:tabletop: npm run archive && cross-env PANEL_HOST=192.168.2.80 python scripts/deploy.py
scripts.deploy:wall: npm run archive && cross-env PANEL_HOST=192.168.2.78 python scripts/deploy.py
scripts.deploy:both: npm run archive && cross-env PANEL_HOST=192.168.2.80 python scripts/deploy.py && cross-env PANEL_HOST=192.168.2.78 python scripts/deploy.py
